creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
City Centre Deira brings us closer to home this Philippines 125th Independence Day! 🇵🇭 

💰 Get a chance to win 125,000 SHARE points daily!  Shop for AED 300 from June 10 to 12 and scan your receipts in the SHARE app to be included in the draw! 

🎶 Watch live performances showcasing Filipino music and culture until June 12! 

Let’s celebrate and have great moments at City Centre Deira this Philippines 125th Independence Day 

@CityCentreDeira @sharetherewards
#GreatMoment #MomentsTogether #CityCentreDeira

#Dubai #Philippines #philippinesindependenceday #ladyandhersweetescapes

transcription.text: City Center DERA brings us closer to home this Philippines' 125th Independence Day. To celebrate the occasion, City Center DERA is rewarding lucky shoppers with 125,000 SharePoints daily. All you have to do is shop for 300 tear humps and scan your receipts in the Share app to be included in the draw on June 10-12. You can watch the Filipino community showcase their talents with live music, talk shows, and cultural performances until June 12. So let's celebrate and have great moments at City Center DERA this Philippines' 125th Independence Day.
